description_long: This urban lounge set consists of a modular sectional sofa, a matching armchair, an ottoman, and a square coffee table. The seating pieces feature a robust metal frame with horizontal slats and a woven support structure beneath the cushions, giving a contemporary industrial look. The cushions are thick, rectangular, and dark-colored, providing comfort and contrast against the metallic frame. The coffee table has a matching metal frame and a slatted or grid-like top, echoing the design language of the seating. The set is designed for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments, such as parks, patios, or communal courtyards. The overall aesthetic is modern, functional, and durable, suitable for high-traffic public spaces.
description: A modern urban lounge set with a metal-framed sectional sofa, armchair, ottoman, and matching slatted coffee table, featuring dark cushions and a contemporary industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sectional sofa with three back cushions, ottoman, armchair, and the square coffee table with a slatted top.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the armchair and ottoman, with the sectional sofa's side and coffee table visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back slats of the sectional sofa and armchair, with the coffee table and ottoman in the background.
description_view_3: Side/rear view emphasizing the length of the sectional sofa, the armchair, and the coffee table's grid top.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large back cushions and two seat cushions on the sectional, one seat and one back cushion on the armchair, and a single cushion on the ottoman; all cushions appear loose and rectangular.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrests with horizontal slats and no visible tufting or segmentation; simple and modern.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on both the sectional and armchair; straight, metal, low-profile armrests matching the frame.
attribute_leg_style: Straight, square metal legs of medium height and thickness, oriented vertically with no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
